message:
feat(storage): add retention-aware cleanup engine and database statistics

Extend the storage layer with cleanup and analytics capabilities:

Storage (crates/wa-core/src/storage.rs):
- Add count_segments_before, count_events_before, count_audit_actions_before,
  count_usage_metrics_before, count_notification_history_before for
  retention-eligible row counting across all cleanable tables
- Add count_events_by_tier for tier-aware event counting (critical,
  warning, info severity thresholds)
- Add delete_events_before and delete_events_by_tier for batched,
  tier-aware deletion with configurable batch size
- Add TableStats, PaneStats, EventTypeStats, DbStatsReport structs
- Add database_stats() for comprehensive DB health reporting including
  file size, table row counts, pane distribution, event type breakdown,
  and retention eligibility

Cleanup engine (crates/wa-core/src/cleanup.rs — new file):
- CleanupPlan and CleanupTableSummary for dry-run preview output
- cleanup_preview(): query each cleanable table for row counts older
  than configured retention, with tier-based event retention
- cleanup_apply(): batched deletion engine that respects retention
  tiers and reports per-table deletion counts
- DELETE_BATCH_SIZE constant (5000) to bound transaction duration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
